text: Deɛ ɛtwa toɔ no, sɛ wotaa di aduaba yi a, ɛbɛboa ama wo nipadua no atumi ako atia yareɛ koankorɔ binom na asane nso ama nipadua no fa a ɛko tia nyarewa no atumi ayɛ adwuma yie.
ref: Finally, regular consumption of this fruit will help your body fight off certain diseases and also improve the immune system.
translated: Finally, if you regularly eat this fruit, it will help your body fight against certain specific diseases and also enable the part of the body that fights against diseases to work well.

text: Ebinom fa nneyɛeɛ a ɛsɛ sɛ yɛda no adi ma yɛn nsa ka apɔmuden pa ho, ebinom fa nnuane a ɛsɛ sɛ yɛdi, nnuro a ɛsɛ sɛ yɛtumi fa ne dodoɔ a ɛtwa sɛ yɛde kɔ yɛn nipadua mu ho.
ref: Some are about the behaviors we need to exhibit to achieve good health, others are about the foods we need to eat, the medications we need to be able to take and the amounts we need to take into our bodies.
translated: Some are about the behaviors we must exhibit to achieve good health, some are about the foods we should eat, the medicines we should take, and the quantities we must take into our bodies.

text: Saa nneyԑeԑ yi si nnuannennuro a ԑwᴐ aduane no mu no kwan, na ԑmma no nnyԑ deԑ ԑsԑ sԑ ԑyԑ wᴐ nipadua no mu.
ref: These processes interfere with the absorption of nutrients in the food, preventing them from doing what they should in the body.
translated: These practices block the nutrients in the food and prevent them from doing what they are supposed to do in the body.

text: Ɛtɔ da mpo a, na wɔtumi de nkyene gu mu toto we no saa ara.
ref: Sometimes it could even be eaten with salt in the same way.
translated: Sometimes they can even add salt to it, roast it, and eat it just like that.
